hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE "\.claude/projects.*memory/"; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Memory file written. Sync .agents/MEMORY.md with any new or changed content before completing."}}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
